item.title: Use clair as the example bc she is the most clear, the lawyers and real estate agents have a different more complicated relation...
item.description:
Use clair as the example bc she is the most clear, the lawyers and real estate agents have a different more complicated relationship that put them as the lower upper class but it’s not as easy. Also this is not an attack on the creator, I think she gave enough caveats for it to make sense more a jumping off point.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This applies to Judaism to btw, unless u live in or are affected by actual Israeli supremacy, largely criticism of the religion ...
item.description:
This applies to Judaism to btw, unless u live in or are affected by actual Israeli supremacy, largely criticism of the religion quo religion is out of place and enables imperial narratives that obscure the actually Christian supremacist state you live in. And TRULY I’m so incredibly tired of the absolute dumbest people misquoting Talmud verses, you look dumb. Please reference Dr. Maya Angelou talking about white criticisms of black authors for a more succinct and notably explaination of this phenomenon.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: In case it’s not clear: I’m not a democratic socialist, I am distinctly to the left of them, I just think the dems response to t...
item.description:
In case it’s not clear: I’m not a democratic socialist, I am distinctly to the left of them, I just think the dems response to their candidates winning is absolutly hilarious and deeply telling



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s an incredibly effective tool of the status quo to hide the political nature of the status quo, so of course people that wan...
item.description:
It’s an incredibly effective tool of the status quo to hide the political nature of the status quo, so of course people that want to perpetuate the current ongoing system of oppression will simply say that it is essential and remove your ideological tools to criticise it



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: How in the world could you push something to the left if you can’t even state leftist ideas that are in opposition to the curren...
item.description:
How in the world could you push something to the left if you can’t even state leftist ideas that are in opposition to the current Democratic party?



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
